title: Comms/Datalink Design Review — 2024-05-15

# Comms/Datalink Design Review — 2024-05-15

**Attendees:** Rowan Ellery, Priya Nair, Tyler Moss, Nina Schulz

## Summary

This page covers the waterproofing philosophy for the Comms/Datalink subsystem. Key items discussed and actions agreed are recorded here.

## Actions

- Follow-up with Felix Herrera on outstanding items.
